About Thuraya

Thuraya Tech is a Saudi company building Arabic-first cloud infrastructure and observability platforms.

Our Story

Thuraya was born from the conviction that the Kingdom deserves technology platforms built locally — that understand its language, regulations, and culture — not imported and adapted. Our name comes from the Pleiades star cluster (Al-Thuraya), a symbol of guidance in the Arabian sky for millennia.

Mission

Empower Saudi organizations to build sovereign, secure, and compliant digital infrastructure.

Vision

To become the reference platform for infrastructure and observability in the Kingdom and the region by 2030.

Values

Sovereignty

Your data is yours. It stays inside the Kingdom.

Craft

World-class engineering with a local soul.

Transparency

Open source where we can. Clear documentation always.

Partnership

We grow with our customers, not at their expense.

Our Team

A small, dedicated Saudi team of engineers combining deep cloud-platform experience with intimate knowledge of the local market.

Saudi Presence

Headquartered in Riyadh, with all production data hosted in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, Jeddah region.

Thuraya Tech
